eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Olmsted, MN; at 6:59 AM on MAY 1, 2019 Effective until 9:14 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System for the city of Rochester and Olmsted County.  If this was a real emergency, instructions would follow with steps to take for personal safety.  This is only a test. This test was conducted using the DisasterLAN emergency notification system. No instructions are provided at this time.  This is only a test.
